POKEMONANCIENT-TRICK_ROOM.title: TrickRoom
POKEMONANCIENT-TRICK_ROOM.description:
Invert your [gold]Speed[/gold].
Move cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] equal to your [gold]Speed[/gold]{InCombat: ({CalculatedCards:diff()})|}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
